Package com.rays.dao

Class FacultyDAOImpl

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rays.common.BaseDAOImpl<FacultyDTO>
      • com.rays.dao.FacultyDAOImpl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    BaseDAOInt<FacultyDTO>, FacultyDAOInt
    @Repository
public class FacultyDAOImpl
extends BaseDAOImpl<FacultyDTO>
implements FacultyDAOInt
    Data Access Object (DAO) implementation for FacultyDTO in the ORS application.

    Extends BaseDAOImpl to inherit common JPA-based CRUD operations and implements FacultyDAOInt. Provides entity-specific implementations for retrieving the DTO class type, building dynamic search filter predicates, and populating denormalized fields such as college name, course name, and subject name before persistence.

    Author:
    Krati Trivedi

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      (package private) CollegeDAOInt collegeDAO
      DAO for retrieving College data used to populate the college name on the FacultyDTO before persistence.

      DAO for retrieving Course data used to populate the course name on the FacultyDTO before persistence.
      (package private) SubjectDAOInt subjectDAO
      DAO for retrieving Subject data used to populate the subject name on the FacultyDTO before persistence.

    • Method Detail

      • getDTOClass

        public java.lang.Class<FacultyDTO> getDTOClass()
        Returns the Class type of FacultyDTO managed by this DAO.
        Specified by:
        getDTOClass in class BaseDAOImpl<FacultyDTO>
        Returns:
        FacultyDTO.class

      • getWhereClause

        public java.util.List<javax.persistence.criteria.Predicate> getWhereClause​(FacultyDTO dto,
                                                                           javax.persistence.criteria.CriteriaBuilder criteriaBuilder,
                                                                           javax.persistence.criteria.Root<FacultyDTO> qRoot)
        Builds and returns a list of JPA Predicate conditions for filtering faculty records based on the non-empty fields of the given FacultyDTO.

        The following fields are used for filtering when non-empty, each using a prefix-based LIKE condition:

        • firstName â€” filters faculty whose first name starts with the given value
        • email â€” filters faculty whose email starts with the given value
        • collegeName â€” filters faculty whose college name starts with the given value
        • courseName â€” filters faculty whose course name starts with the given value
        • subjectName â€” filters faculty whose subject name starts with the given value

        Specified by:
        getWhereClause in class BaseDAOImpl<FacultyDTO>
        Parameters:
        dto - the FacultyDTO containing filter values
        criteriaBuilder - the CriteriaBuilder used to construct predicates
        qRoot - the Root of the criteria query for FacultyDTO
        Returns:
        a list of Predicate conditions for the WHERE clause

      • populate

        protected void populate​(FacultyDTO dto,
                        UserContext userContext)
        Populates denormalized name fields on the FacultyDTO before persistence.

        Resolves and sets the following fields based on their corresponding IDs:

        • collegeName â€” resolved from collegeId using CollegeDAOInt
        • subjectName â€” resolved from subjectId using SubjectDAOInt
        • courseName â€” resolved from courseId using CourseDAOInt
        Each field is only populated if its corresponding ID is non-null and greater than zero.

        Overrides:
        populate in class BaseDAOImpl<FacultyDTO>
        Parameters:
        dto - the FacultyDTO to be populated
        userContext - the current user's context
